hotelImages.caption: Baiturrahman Grand Mosque - 2.06 km from property

address.address1: Jalan Sultan Iskandar Muda no.217, Banda Aceh

favoriteFeatures.name: Airport transfer
favoriteFeatures.tooltip: Airport transfer available at additional charge. To request, check the box on the booking form just before the payment page.

atfPropertyHighlights.name: Airport transfer
atfPropertyHighlights.tooltip: Airport transfer available at additional charge. To request, check the box on the booking form just before the payment page.

description.short: In addition to the standard of Indonesia Care, all guests get free Wi-Fi in all rooms and free parking if arriving by car. Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. This 3-star property features restaurant to make your stay more indulgent and memorable.

details.title: Infant 0-0 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

details.title: Children 1-7 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

adult: Guests 8 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Very friendly staff. Spacious and comfortable lobby. We asked their permission to leave the baggage at the hotel, and they kept our belongings in a good care, sent the baggage to the front door of our room. The breakfast was ready early. Very clean. Got some shops and small food stall near to the hotel. A very good stay here 🫰🏻

comments.reviewTitle: Clean, spacious and fast check in

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The receptionist simply ignored us and entertain other guests when we question about their elevators that broke down. I brought my two grandmothers who are over 80 years old and our rooms are at the third floor so elevators are essential to us. But without any assurance or estimated time until the elevators get fixed the receptionist simply ignored us. From our interactions later on we learnt that the receptionist is actually a decent person however the professionalism displayed is simply a let down.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
The room was decent, breakfast menu considerably good though I would suggest more local food added to the breakfast buffet.
Banda Aceh is small town, doesn't matter where u stay u can get anywhere easily...This hotel is away from the busy streets though..

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Drainage system in toilet damn worst , keep on flooding after shower . and the water heater gt no hot water . still gt this kind of problem after changing second room . furthermore , the breakfast so so , not much variety , mostly are local food tht too hard for us to bite @@　anyway, i love the all the staff , cause so helpful , keep on full fill customer needs wisely . hope the hotel owner wil improve their facilities asap .
comments.reviewTitle: little bit disappointing to the value

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: 1 traveler found this review helpful. Did you?
comments.reviewComments: Hotel is affordable, clean and staffs are friendly

comments.reviewTitle: value for money and aesy access to the town

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: 1 traveler found this review helpful. Did you?
comments.reviewComments: Clean hotel. We just checked in for few hours while waiting for our flight on the next morning. Value for money since the room comes with breakfast but we didn't have a chance to eat because we have to left early in the morning to catch our flight.
comments.reviewTitle: A quick rest before leaving aceh

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Hotel nearby to Ulee Lheu Port, so if you have a ferry schedule to Sabang in the morning this hotel can acommodate that. But the room is not quite good for 3 stars hotel. The price is overrated but they serve breakfast on 5.30 am which is good because my ferry schedule on 7 am.
comments.reviewTitle: Only 5 minutes to Ulee Lheu Port

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?

comments.reviewPositives: Location easy access & near to town centre

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Prima hotel, stop-over naar Pulau Weh.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Sistem pengurusan yang teruk.Bilik yang ditempah tiada dalam sistem di hotel grand permata hati jalan sultan iskandar muda.diminta  berpindah ke grand permata hati jalan keretapi lama..lokasi yang jauh dari kota Terima kasih kepada Pak Budi atas bantuan yang diberi.Staf yang mesra..

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: 가격대비 숙소의 시설들은 좋습니다. 하지만 침대 위에 머리카락이 여러개 발견 되었고 밖에 소리가 잘 들려서 방음이 아쉽습니다.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: 라마단 기간이라  모든 것이 불편한 상황이었지만 나름 만족. 쾌적하고 넓은 방.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: 作为班达亚齐的过渡性酒店还是可以的。

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: 环境整洁，对整洁不要要求太高。反正没有头发灰尘。就是很普通的一个标间。吃的我是让酒店人员骑摩托带我去市区买的，给了5万服务费。很公道。真的，不信你除两千看看才多少人民币。榴莲和甘蔗水值得买，ikan bakar烤鱼 , ayam bakar烤鸡 ,rendang 巴东牛肉, steak牛排，iga bakar烤牛排骨肉，我吃了烤鱼，还行。以上这些都算好吃的，中国人能接受的口味。其他就算了啊，出门在外，但求能活下来已经不错了。
comments.reviewTitle: 很适合第二天赶早班机

comments.reviewComments:
kamar mandi kurang bersih, kamar bau rokok dan lantai di selipan lemari dan tempat tidur kotor.
staff kurang ramah dan saat breakfast piring langsung diangkat tanpa bertanya apakah sudah selesai makan atau belum
letak hotel dekat dengan pelabuhan ulee lheu memudahkan untuk mengejar kapal cepat pagi.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: 1 traveler found this review helpful. Did you?
comments.reviewComments: Ini hotel yang baru dibuka 5 bulan, kamarnya besar dan bersih, lokasi dekat dengan pelabuhan ferry yaitu hanya 5 menit dgn becak motor, sangat rekomendasi bagi wisatawan yang akan berkunjung ke Sabang.
comments.reviewTitle: Hotel baru yang bersih, staff ramah dan lokasi dekat dgn pelabuhan ferry
